response.justification: Solid full-stack engineering background with broad polyglot experience over ~15 years, but the resume lacks the Principal/Director-level signals the role requires: no recognized AI expertise, no shipped AI products or platforms, no evidence of advising strategic customers, and no track record of large-scale technical leadership or innovation at the scope expected for a Director-level IC.
strengths: ~15 years of hands-on engineering across web, mobile, embedded
Polyglot full-stack delivery with TDD and CI/CD discipline
Some recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling
concerns: No demonstrated AI products, platforms, or recognized AI expertise
Lacks Principal/Director-level scope, influence, or strategy work
No evidence of advising strategic customers or shaping cloud product direction

key_factors.factor: Missing recognized AI expertise and shipped AI products
Seniority and scope below Principal/Director IC level
